1.prompt: Another day of profit I see? You’re doing well, keep it up. Regrettably, you are not doing as well as you could be, but that may be for the better. I just can’t control myself when an employee does their job with such grace…

options.response: Ah, of course. Keep pumping out that revenue!

Well that’s not what I hired you to be. If you can find a job that lets you slack around and nap all day then feel free to file for a position. Oh, wait, the contract doesn’t let you do that, silly me! Now get to work.
